interpretation: Northern county acreage has expanded at -8.25%/yr 1980-2025. Projecting forward 26 years from the observed rate gives a -89.3% expansion to 2050; the gross opportunity falls from $37.0B (maximum-acreage upper) to $3.9B (projected-acreage central). The headline $0.59-11.1B/yr range brackets both.
